metadata.notes: Support gems in PoE2 use a tier-based system (Tier 1-5+). Higher tiers provide better values and sometimes additional effects. As of patch 0.3.0, players can now use multiple copies of the same support gem across different skills.

faster_projectiles.name: Faster Projectiles
faster_projectiles.notes: Projectile speed does NOT increase range in PoE2

ricochet_iii.name: Ricochet III
ricochet_iii.notes: Modifiers granting additional projectiles instead cause projectiles to chain an additional time from terrain per projectile

inevitable_critical.name: Inevitable Critical
inevitable_critical.notes: Gains 25% increased Critical Strike Chance each second, up to 100%. Lost when skill critically hits.

ancestral_call_i.name: Ancestral Call I
restrictions: Does not modify Skills used by Minions

archmage.name: Archmage
archmage.notes: Non-Channelling Spells cost additional mana and gain extra Lightning damage based on maximum Mana. Updated to 4% from 3% in Patch 0.3.0

zahrokhs_refrain.name: Zarokh's Refrain
zahrokhs_refrain.acquisition: Zarokh, the Temporal (Trial of the Sekhemas floor 4) - Rare drop
zahrokhs_refrain.notes: Supports Spells that affect an area around you or a target location. Supported Spells echo twice.

rakiatas_flow.name: Rakiata's Flow
rakiatas_flow.acquisition: Manoki, the Chosen (The Jade Isles) - Anomaly boss
rakiatas_flow.notes: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, causing those Hits to treat Enemy Elemental Resistances as inverted.

garukhans_resolve.name: Garukhan's Resolve
restrictions: Does not modify skills used by Minions
garukhans_resolve.acquisition: Zahmir, the Blade Sovereign (Sacred Reservoir) - Anomaly boss
garukhans_resolve.notes: Guarantees a lucky roll on critical strikes. Supported Skills can only be used after moving a certain distance.

uruks_smelting.name: Uruk's Smelting
uruks_smelting.notes: Enhances physical damage by breaking armor. Targets take up to 40% increased physical damage when armor fully breaks.

ailiths_chimes.name: Ailith's Chimes
ailiths_chimes.notes: Supports Skills that can expend Combo. Chance to gain Power Charges based on Combo expended.

ahns_citadel.name: Ahn's Citadel
ahns_citadel.notes: Supports skills that create walls in a line, causing them to instead be created along a Fissure.

arjuns_medal.name: Arjun's Medal
arjuns_medal.notes: Supports Crossbow Skills. Chance to load a bolt into all Crossbow Ammunition on kill.

atziris_allure.name: Atziri's Allure
atziris_allure.notes: Supports Curse Skills. Curses ignore the usual Curse Limit, but are reflected back to you.

arakaalis_lust.name: Arakaali's Lust
arakaalis_lust.notes: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies. Deals increasingly higher damage the more Poisons are on the target.

arbiters_ignition.name: Arbiter's Ignition
arbiters_ignition.notes: Supports Fire Spell Skills. Chance to gain Flame Archon when Igniting.

diallas_desire.name: Dialla's Desire
diallas_desire.notes: Supports any Skill which has levels, increasing the level and Quality, while reducing cost and Reservation.

doedres_undoing.name: Doedre's Undoing
doedres_undoing.notes: Supports Curse Skills. Creates Hazardous areas which explode when Enemies enter, Cursing and dealing Chaos Damage based on Intelligence.

eshs_radiance.name: Esh's Radiance
eshs_radiance.notes: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits. Grants extra Chaos damage and causes Chaos damage to Contribute to Shock.

ixchels_torment.name: Ixchel's Torment
ixchels_torment.notes: Supports Skills that Trigger other Skills.

brutus_brain.name: Brutus' Brain
brutus_brain.notes: Supports skills which create Minions. Those Minions are unable to deal or take Damage.

daressos_passion.name: Daresso's Passion
daressos_passion.notes: Supports Banner Skills, causing them to require significantly less Glory to use.

pietys_mercy.name: Piety's Mercy
pietys_mercy.notes: Supports Skills that cause Damaging Hits. Hits from Supported Skills cannot kill Enemies.

vilentas_propulsion.name: Vilenta's Propulsion
vilentas_propulsion.notes: Supports Spell Skills that fire Projectiles. Increases and reductions to cast speed also apply to Projectile speed.

amanamus_tithe.name: Amanamu's Tithe
amanamus_tithe.notes: Supports Persistent Minion Skills. Chance when Minions die to gain an Abyssal Monster Modifier.

ataluis_bloodletting.name: Atalui's Bloodletting
ataluis_bloodletting.notes: Supports any Skill, turning a portion of its Mana cost into a Life cost.

support_gem_restrictions.one_per_category_per_skill: You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill
support_gem_restrictions.one_per_loadout_removed: As of patch 0.3.0, you can now use the same support gem on multiple skills (previously restricted to one per character)
support_gem_restrictions.max_support_sockets: Each skill can have up to 5 support sockets (requires Jeweller's Orbs to expand from base 2)

tier_system.description: Support Gems have a tier-based system (1-5+) that determines stat value ranges
tier_system.higher_tiers: Higher-tiered Support Gems have higher values and some have secondary effects
tier_system.acquisition: Different tiers require different level Uncut Support Gems to craft

mana_system.note: PoE2 handles mana costs differently than PoE1. Cost multipliers apply but the system is reworked.

spirit_gems.description: Spirit gems (like Archmage, Heralds, Auras) reserve Spirit instead of mana
spirit_gems.trigger_gems: Trigger support gems like Cast on Critical Strike and Cast on Shock are now Meta Gems that reserve Spirit

temporary_wealth,_but_integrated_into_th.name: Temporary wealth, but integrated into the endgame

arcane_surge.name: Arcane Surge
arcane_surge.description: NEW: The Arcane Surge Buff now grants 15% increased Cast Speed instead of 10% more Cast Speed.The Force of Will Notable Passive Skill no longer grants 1% increased Effect of Arcane Surge on you per 25 Maximum Mana. Instead, it now grants 20% of damage is taken from Mana before Life, and 20% increased magnitude of Arcane Surge on you per 10% missing Mana.The Arcane Surge Buff now grants 15% increased Cast Speed instead of 10% more Cast Speed.

first_ascendancy:_trail_of_the_sekhemas.name: First Ascendancy: Trail of the Sekhemas

astral_projection.name: Astral Projection
astral_projection.description: Supported Skills Cast at the targeted location instead of around you

blazing_critical.name: Blazing Critical
blazing_critical.description: AttacksGain15% of Damage asFireDamage for5seconds onCritically Hittingwith Supported Skills

boundless_energy_i.name: Boundless Energy I
boundless_energy_i.description: Cast on Minion Death,Barrier Invocation,Elemental Invocation

boundless_energy_ii.name: Boundless Energy II
boundless_energy_ii.description: Cast on Minion Death,Barrier Invocation,Elemental Invocation

burning_inscription.name: Burning Inscription
burning_inscription.description: CreateIgnited Ground, Igniting enemies as though dealingFire Damageequal to20% of your Maximum Mana

chaos_attunement.name: Chaos Attunement
chaos_attunement.description: The Lightning/Cold/Fire/Chaos Infusion Support Gems have been renamed to Lightning/Cold/Fire/Chaos Attunement.

clarity_i.name: Clarity I
clarity_i.description: Siphon Elements,Blink,Blasphemy,Cast on Minion Death,Barrier Invocation,Elemental Invocation,Barkskin

clarity_ii.name: Clarity II
clarity_ii.description: Blink,Blasphemy,Cast on Minion Death,Barrier Invocation,Elemental Invocation

cold_exposure.name: Cold Exposure
cold_exposure.description: * The Fire Exposure, Lightning Exposure and Cold Exposure Support Gems no longer penalize Damage of Supported Skills. They now have a Mana Cost Multiplier of 120%.

considered_casting.name: Considered Casting
considered_casting.description: Considered Casting now has a 115% Cost Multiplier (previously 100%), and causes Supported Spells to deal 35% more Damage (previously 40%).Considered Casting now has a 115% Cost Multiplier (previously 100%).Considered Casting now has a 115% Cost Multiplier (previously 100%), and causes Supported Spells to deal 35% more Damage (previously 40%).

creeping_chill.name: Creeping Chill
creeping_chill.description: CreatedChilled GroundChillsas though dealing damage equal to100% of theIce Crystal's maximum Life

energy_retention.name: Energy Retention
energy_retention.description: Cast on Elemental Ailment,Cast on Critical,Cast on Dodge,Reaper's Invocation,Feral Invocation

fiery_death.name: Fiery Death
fiery_death.description: Explosion deals baseFireDamage equal to10% of theCorpse'sMaximum Life

flow.name: Flow
flow.description: Overflow effects on Life, Mana and Energy Shield can now Overflow the maximum by up to 1.5 times (from 2 times)The Flowing Metal Notable Passive Skill now causes Body Armour to grant 50% of Armour to also applies to Elemental Damage from Hits (previously caused Body Armour to grant +5% to Maximum Fire Resistance).The Flowing Metal Notable Passive Skill now causes Body Armour to grant 50% of Armour to also applies to Elemental Damage from Hits (previously caused Body Armour to grant +5% to Maximu

fluke.name: Fluke
fluke.description: Cast on Elemental Ailment,Cast on Critical,Cast on Dodge,Feral Invocation

freeze.name: Freeze
freeze.description: Added a new Intelligence Persistent Buff Gem — Siphon Elements: While active, has a chance to create an Infusion Remnant when you Freeze, Shock or Ignite a target.Ice Crystals will now instantly shatter from hits that could Consume Freeze. As this is now default behaviour, Glacial Cascade and Fragmentation Rounds no longer specifically call out this behaviour.Shattering Concoction, granted by the Shattering Concoction Notable Passive Skill choice, now inflicts Elemental Exposure on hit instead o

hourglass.name: Hourglass
hourglass.description: The Quicksand Hourglass Notable Passive Skill no longer grants Every 10 seconds gain 50% more Cast Speed for 5 seconds. Instead, it now grants Sands of Time, which grants 60% Cast Speed, scaling down to 1% over 10 seconds at which point it will then scale back up to 60%. Sands of Time also grants 1% increased Area of Effect, scaling up to 60% over 10 seconds, at which point it will then scale back down to 1%.Failing to collect all the hourglasses during the Zarokh, the Temporal boss fight no lon

ignite_i.name: Ignite I
ignite_i.description: These changes do not affect how ignite itself functions or is calculated once it has been applied.Explosive Concoction, granted by the Explosive Concoction Notable Passive Skill choice, no longer has 200% more magnitude of ignite inflicted, and no longer inflicts Fire Exposure on hit. Now fires up to four additional mini flask projectiles at ignited enemies. Quality now grants +0-2 additional mini flask projectiles thrown at ignited enemies, instead ofSpear of Solaris: Initial Hit now deals appr

immolate.name: Immolate
immolate.description: SupportedAttacksGain30% of Damage as extraFireDamage againstIgnitedenemies

infernal_legion_i.name: Infernal Legion I
infernal_legion_i.description: Minionsfrom Supported Skills take20% of their maximum Life asFireDamage per second

infernal_legion_ii.name: Infernal Legion II
infernal_legion_ii.description: Minionsfrom Supported Skills take20% of their maximum Life asFireDamage per second

infernal_legion_iii.name: Infernal Legion III
infernal_legion_iii.description: Minionsfrom Supported Skills take30% of their maximum Life asFireDamage per second

infusion.name: Infusion
infusion.description: Refracted Infusion now grants: When collecting an Elemental Infusion, gain another different Elemental Infusion (previously 50% chance).Thaumaturgical Infusion now grants: +1% to Maximum Cold Resistance per 3 Blue Support Gems Socketed (previously 4). +1% to Maximum Fire Resistance per 3 Red Support Gems Socketed (previously 4). +1% to Maximum Lightning Resistance per 3 Green Support Gems Socketed (previously 4).The Elemental Equilibrium Keystone now grants Cold Infusion Remnants you create are

knockback.name: Knockback
knockback.description: 50% increased Movement Speed50% increasedAttackSpeed50% increased Cast Speed100% chance toKnock Enemies Backon hit400% increasedKnockbackDistanceAttackCasterSpeed

lightning_exposure.name: Lightning Exposure
lightning_exposure.description: *Fire ExposureandLightning ExposureSupports have had their wording adjusted to make clear their effects apply to any target, not just Enemies. This is not a functional change, just a clarification of wording.

living_lightning.name: Living Lightning
living_lightning.description: Creates 1 Minion\nLevel of Minions is based on Level ofTriggeringSkill

living_lightning_ii.name: Living Lightning II
living_lightning_ii.description: Creates 1 Minion\nLevel of Minions is based on Level ofTriggeringSkill

mana_flare.name: Mana Flare
mana_flare.description: Consumes25% of current Mana to deal that muchFiredamage

mercenary.name: Mercenary
mercenary.description: I'll do as you ask, my lady. I'll bring you fire.—WaterGoddessDirectToFire

minion_instability.name: Minion Instability
minion_instability.description: Minionsfrom Supported Skills explode when reduced toLow Life, dealing15% of their maximum Life asFireDamage to surrounding Enemies

mysticism_i.name: Mysticism I
mysticism_i.description: Cast on Elemental Ailment,Archmage,Elemental Conflux,Sacrifice,Cast on Critical,Cast on Dodge,Reaper's Invocation,Eternal Rage,Feral Invocation

payload.name: Payload
payload.description: Siege Cascade: Impact now deals 94-145% of Attack Damage at Gem levels 13-20 (previously 59-91%), while the Explosion now deals 352-543% of Attack Damage (previously 258-398%). No longer deals 200% more Damage against Immobilised Enemies. No longer has a hidden 100% less Stun Buildup against Enemies, converts 80% of Physical Damage to Fire Damage, or has the Payoff and Fire Gem tags. Payload radius is now 0.4 metres (previously 0.5), while the Bolt explosion radius is now 0.8 metres (previously

poison_i.name: Poison I
poison_i.description: Added a new Dexterity Skill Gem — Toxic Domain: Create an area of Toxic Bloom on the ground around you. While in the Bloom, you have increased Skill costs, regenerate Life, and your Projectile Attacks attach a Toxic Pustule, which can be Poisoned, Pustules will Detonate after a duration or when enough Poison has been applied, dealing damage and applying Poison in an area around it.Poisonburst Arrow: Quality now provides 0-20% more Magnitude of Poison inflicted (previously 0-20% increased Magnitu

quest.name: Quest
quest.description: +5% Fire Resistance or +5 Strength+5% Cold Resistance or +5 Dexterity+5% Lightning Resistance or +5 Intelligence

rapid_casting_i.name: Rapid Casting I
rapid_casting_i.description: * Fixed a bug where Rapid Casting III was not providing increased Cast Speed for each different Spell you had Cast in the last eight seconds.

rapid_casting_ii.name: Rapid Casting II
rapid_casting_ii.description: * Fixed a bug where Rapid Casting III was not providing increased Cast Speed for each different Spell you had Cast in the last eight seconds.

rapid_casting_iii.name: Rapid Casting III
rapid_casting_iii.description: Supported Skills have10% increased Cast Speed for each differentSpellyou've Cast in the last eight seconds

rip.name: Rip
rip.description: * Added description text to Atziri's Chambers to clarify how to unlock the room.* Updated the Spectral Fire keyword to correctly state that damage modifiers do not scale the explosion further, this is purely a description change.

salvo.name: Salvo
salvo.description: Freezing Salvo now scales Freeze Buildup with Gem level, up to 107% more at Gem level 20 (previously 50% at all levels).Magnetic Salvo now deals 100-140% of Attack Damage with Impact at Gem levels 13-20 (previously 89-125%), and 155-218% of Attack Damage with Explosion at Gem levels 13-20 (previously 177-250%). It now Fires up to 8 Missiles at all Gem levels (previously 14-17 at Gem levels 13-20). Quality now provides +0-4 Missiles, instead of 0-20% more Projectile Damage.When using a controller

shock.name: Shock
shock.description: Added a new Mountain Splitter Ascendancy Passive Skill which grants Every Third Slam Skill that doesn't create Fissures which you use yourself causes 3 additional Aftershocks ahead and to each side of the initial area. Requires Crushing Impacts.Shocking and Igniting now grant 1 Unbound Fury (previously 2).Stormfire Support: Now causes enemies Shocked by Supported Skills to take a percentage of Ignite damage as Lightning damage as well as Fire damage. (previously Shocks from Supported Skills do n

spar.name: Spar
spar.description: Spark now fires 4-9 Projectiles at gem levels 1-20 (previously 6-14), and no longer has 0-19% increased Projectile Speed. Quality now provides 0-30% increased Projectile Speed (previously Fires +0-4 Projectiles).

spell_cascade.name: Spell Cascade
spell_cascade.description: * Fixed a bug where Summon Spectre, Tame Beast, and Disciple of Varashta's Ruzhan could not be supported by Spell Echo or Spell Cascade.

stormfire.name: Stormfire
stormfire.description: EnemiesShockedby Supported Skills take20% of damage fromIgniteasLightningdamage as well asFiredamage

unbending.name: Unbending
unbending.description: 8% of Damage taken while using Supported Skills isRecoupedas Mana per quarter second of Cast time of Supported Skill

unnatural_resilience.name: Unnatural Resilience
unnatural_resilience.description: Unnatural ResilienceLiquid Emotions:Isolation,Isolation,Isolation+3% to allElementalResistances+2% toMaximum Fire Resistanceif you have at least 5 RedSupport GemsSocketed

urgent_totems_iii.name: Urgent Totems III
urgent_totems_iii.description: SpellsCast byTotemscreated by Supported Skills have20% increased Cast Speed

vitality_i.name: Vitality I
vitality_i.description: Overwhelming Presence,Time of Need,Herald of Plague,Combat Frenzy,Siphon Elements,Blink,Cast on Minion Death,Barrier Invocation,Elemental Invocation,Barkskin

waystone.description: Monsters deal(15—20)% of Damage as Extra Fire28% increased number ofMagicMonsters15% increasedWaystonesfound in Area

xibaqua's_rending.description: Explosion deals baseFireDamage equal to6% of theCorpse'sMaximum Life
